source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/1. 신청시 제출본/04 기타구비서류/KT844_주식회사_액트_kolas 인정서.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: KOLAS certificate scope pages for KT844 list electrical safety and EMC test standards and ranges for measurement, household, medical, industrial, and radio/communication equipment.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence that certificate KT844 includes accredited testing scopes for listed IEC/EN/CISPR/ETSI safety and EMC standards, including medical electrical equipment and IVD-related standards.
keyPoints: Certificate identifier appears as 제 KT844호 on pages listing test scopes.
Electrical safety scope includes 03.005 계측기기, 03.007 가정용 전기기기, and 03.010 의료기기.
EMC scope includes 03.011 전자기적합성 with CE, RE, ESD, RS, EFT/Burst, Surge, CS, magnetic field, and voltage dip ranges.
In vitro diagnostic equipment appears under EN/IEC 61010-2-101 and EN/IEC 61326-2-6.
Most safety scope entries state site testing as 소재지 N or 부속시설-1 N.

concepts.name: EN/IEC 61010 electrical safety testing for measurement, control, and laboratory equipment
concepts.evidence: Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control, and laboratory use - Part 1: General requirements

concepts.name: IEC 61010-2-101 IVD medical equipment safety testing
concepts.evidence: Part 2-101: Particular requirements for in vitro diagnostic (IVD) medical equipment

concepts.name: IEC 60601 medical electrical equipment safety testing
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment - Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1-2 medical EMC testing
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard : Electromagnetic disturbances - Requirements and tests

concepts.name: IEC 61326 EMC requirements for laboratory and IVD equipment
concepts.evidence: Electrical equipment for measurement, control and laboratory use – EMC requirements – Part 2-6: Particular requirements – In vitro diagnostic (IVD) medical equipment

concepts.name: IEC 62368 audio/video and ICT safety testing
concepts.evidence: Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment - Part 1: Safety requirements

concepts.name: CISPR EMC emission and immunity testing
concepts.evidence: Industrial, scientific and medical equipment - Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics - Limits and methods of measurement

concepts.name: ETSI EN 301 489 radio equipment EMC testing
concepts.evidence: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) standard for radio equipment and services; Part 1: Common technical requirements

evidence.claim: Certificate KT844 contains electrical testing scope for measurement instruments under EN/IEC 61010 standards.
evidence.evidenceText: 03. 전기시험 03.005 계측기기 ... EN 61010-1:2010 계측기기 Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control, and laboratory use - Part 1: General requirements

evidence.claim: The scope includes EN/IEC 61010-2-101 for in vitro diagnostic medical equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: EN IEC 61010-2-101:2022+A11:2022 계측기기 Safety requirements for electrical equipment for measurement, control and laboratory use - Part 2-101: Particular requirements for in vitro diagnostic (IVD) medical equipment

evidence.claim: The scope includes medical electrical equipment safety standards under EN/IEC 60601.
evidence.evidenceText: 03.010 의료기기 ... EN 60601-1:2006+A1:2013+A12:2014 의료기기 Medical electrical equipment - Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance

evidence.claim: The scope includes medical EMC testing under EN/IEC 60601-1-2.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021 의료기기 Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance - Collateral standard : Electromagnetic disturbances - Requirements and tests

evidence.claim: The EMC scope includes EN/IEC 61326-2-6 for IVD medical equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: EN IEC 61326-2-6:2021 계측기기 Electrical equipment for measurement, control and laboratory use – EMC requirements – Part 2-6: Particular requirements – In vitro diagnostic (IVD) medical equipment

evidence.claim: The safety test range commonly lists single phase up to 300 V a.c., three phase up to 600 V a.c., temperature 0 to 200 ℃, dielectric strength AC/DC 10 kV, and temperature/humidity -40 to 120 ℃, max 93% R.H.
evidence.evidenceText: Single phase: Max. 300 V a.c. Three phase: Max. 600 V a.c. Temperature: (0 ~ 200) ℃ Dielectric strength: AC/DC 10 kV Temperature & Humidity: (-40 ~ 120) ℃, Max. 93 % R.H.

evidence.claim: X-ray related safety scope entries list X-ray measurement range from 0.000 μSv to 9999 Sv and distance 5.5 m.
The EMC test scope includes 1 phase equipment up to 16 A.
ETSI EN 301 489 radio equipment EMC standards are included for radio equipment and services.
evidence.evidenceText: ETSI EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 (2019-11) 유/무선 통신기기 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) standard for radio equipment and services; Part 1: Common technical requirements

evidence.claim: The listed test location indicators include 소재지 N and 부속시설-1 N.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present in the provided source text.
The issuing authority is inferred from the source filename containing kolas; the provided page text mainly shows 제 KT844호 and does not show the full issuing authority block.
Product models GT1717C, GT1717CP and product signal CYAN appear in sourcePath metadata but not in the extracted source text, so productModels is empty.
The source text begins at page 2/120 and appears to omit cover-page metadata such as full title, issue date, and accreditation body header.
OCR/text extraction has line breaks inside standard numbers and words, so some standard identifiers were normalized only where the surrounding text clearly supported the joined form.
